mnemonics.title: Cloud Service Models
mnemonics.content: I P S MEMO: IAAS = PHYSICAL, PAAS = PLATFORM, SAAS = SOFTWARE (First letters represent user management responsibility increasing)

acronyms.usage: Used in embedded systems like medical devices, aircraft control systems where timing is critical
Manages network resources and provides shared services in enterprise environments
Another term for hypervisor that enables virtualization
Email services like Gmail, productivity apps like Microsoft 365
Development platforms like Heroku, Google App Engine
Cloud computing like AWS EC2, Microsoft Azure virtual machines
Used for communication between applications in distributed environments

visualTips.visualization: Draw a central server with lines connecting to multiple client computers around it, arrows showing request-response flow
Stack diagram: IaaS at bottom (hardware), PaaS in middle (platform), SaaS at top (software) - user responsibility decreases going up
Draw hardware at bottom, hypervisor layer above it, multiple VM boxes on top, each containing its own OS and applications
Multiple computers connected in a circle with a virtual single system overlay showing unified access

analogies.analogy: Like utilities (electricity, water) - you pay for what you use, no need to build your own power plant
Like an apartment building - one physical building (hardware) contains multiple separate living spaces (VMs) with independent resources
Like a restaurant - clients (customers) make requests, server (waiter) fetches food (resources) from kitchen (database)
Like a professor teaching multiple classes rapidly in succession, giving each brief attention so all feel served
